text: Running: set -euo pipefail for i in $(seq 1 20); do ok=1 for p in 26657 26667 26677 26687; do if ! curl -sf "http://localhost:${p}/status" >/tmp/gc-realtest/.s${p}.json; then ok=0 fi done if [ "$ok" = "1" ]; then break fi sleep 1 done for p in 26657 26667 26677 26687; do h=$(cat /tmp/gc-realtest/.s${p}.json | jq -r '"'.result.sync_info.latest_block_height') c="'$(cat /tmp/gc-realtest/.s${p}.json | jq -r '"'.result.sync_info.catching_up') peers="'$(curl -s "http://localhost:${p}/net_info" | jq -r '"'.result.n_peers') echo \"port="'${p} h=${h} catching_up=${c} peers=${peers}" done h1=$(curl -s http://localhost:26657/status | jq -r '"'.result.sync_info.latest_block_height') sleep 2 h2="'$(curl -s http://localhost:26657/status | jq -r '"'.result.sync_info.latest_block_height') echo \"node0_height_progress="'${h1}->${h2}"

Running: set -euo pipefail BIN=/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-consensus/build/giltconsd HOME=/tmp/gc-realtest/node0/giltconsd BASE_TX=32569FF91B89057D1690108847373AD0B0CA7FEF70B8AD56FE610DF131FD06E3 base=$($BIN query tx "$BASE_TX" --node http://localhost:26657 --output json | sed -n '"'/"'^{/,$p'"') operator="'$(echo "$base" | jq -r '"'.tx.body.messages[0].operator') act="'$(echo "$base" | jq -r '"'.tx.body.messages[0].activation_epoch') maxstake="'$(echo "$base" | jq -r '"'.tx.body.messages[0].max_gilt_stake') pubhex="'$(echo "$base" | jq -r '"'.tx.body.messages[0].signer_pub_key' | base64 -d | xxd -p -c 256) pubhex=\"0x"'${pubhex}" send_vote () { local from=$1 local out out=$($BIN tx stake approve-validator 5 "$operator" "$act" "$maxstake" "$pubhex" 1 '"\\ --from \""'$from" --home "$HOME" --keyring-backend test --chain-id goldlocal '"\\ --node http://localhost:26657 --yes --broadcast-mode sync --gas 300000 --fees 1gilt 2>&1) echo \""'$out" local txh txh=$(echo "$out" | rg -o "[A-F0-9]{64}" | tail -n1) if [ -z "$txh" ]; then echo "${from}:txhash_parse_failed" return 1 fi for i in $(seq 1 20); do local q q=$($BIN query tx "$txh" --node http://localhost:26657 --output json 2>/dev/null | sed -n '"'/"'^{/,$p'"' || true) if [ -n \""'$q" ]; then local code code=$(echo "$q" | jq -r '"'.code') echo \""'${from}:txhash=${txh}:code=${code}:try=${i}" echo "$q" return 0 fi sleep 1 done echo "${from}:tx_not_found:${txh}" return 1 } send_vote val1 send_vote val2
